items.title: Scientists discover the deep sleep circuit that builds muscle, burns fat, and boosts the brain
items.summary: Researchers have identified the brain circuitry that links deep sleep with the release of growth hormone, revealing how the two regulate each other. The newly discovered feedback loop helps explain why poor sleep can interfere with growth, muscle repair, fat metabolism, and brain function. Understan

items.title: The secret to healthy aging may be hidden in your blood
items.summary: Some people live past 100 with remarkable health, and researchers may have uncovered one reason why. items.title: A hidden weakness in deadly cancers could lead to powerful new treatments
items.summary: A UCLA study has identified a hidden Achilles' heel in aggressive small cell cancers that have resisted new treatments for decades.
